use_cases: Primary action trigger in SaaS dashboards and admin panels
Theme-aware CTA buttons in landing pages
Premium-feel interactive elements for fintech applications
Lock/unlock state toggles in authentication flows
Form submission triggers with hover feedback states
ai_summary: A premium gradient button component with glass-morphism styling that adapts its visual treatment based on light/dark theme resolution. Features radial gradient backgrounds, inset dual shadows for depth, theme-aware stroke colors on the lock icon, and rounded pill styling. Built with next-themes for automatic dark/light mode detection and includes hover glow interactions through CSS group classes.
